description_long: This is a medium-sized croissant with a golden-brown, slightly uneven surface, generously sprinkled with a variety of seeds such as sesame and flax. The pastry displays a classic crescent shape, with visible ridges and folds that hint at its layered, flaky interior. The crust appears crisp and textured, with some areas showing a matte finish and others a subtle sheen from baking. The ends of the croissant are tapered and slightly darker, while the central body is plumper and more rounded. The seeds are distributed unevenly, adding visual interest and texture to the surface. Overall, the croissant looks freshly baked and appetizing, suitable for display in a bakery or urban café setting.
description: A golden-brown, seed-topped croissant with a crisp, flaky surface and classic crescent shape. The pastry features visible layers, ridges, and a textured, appetizing crust.
description_view_0: The croissant is viewed from the tip, showing its rounded, tapered end and a dense cluster of seeds on the upper surface.
description_view_1: A side profile reveals the full crescent shape, visible layers, and the distribution of seeds along the top ridge.
description_view_2: The opposite end is visible, showing another tapered tip and the curved body, with seeds and surface texture clearly seen.
description_view_3: A top-down view highlights the full spread of the croissant, the central bulge, and the even distribution of seeds across the surface.
